hero.headline: Level Up Your Skills in Just a Few Weeks
hero.subheadline: Join our intensive training series and walk away with real, hands-on results you can use immediately.
hero.formSubtext: Starts soon. No credit card required.

benefits.headline: Why This Training Is Different
benefits.subheadline: No slides-and-lecture fluff. Real frameworks, real practice, real results.

items.title: Intensive & Focused
items.description: Every session is designed around one outcome — skills you can apply the same day.

items.title: Proven Methods
items.description: Battle-tested approaches refined over years of real-world experience with top teams.

items.title: Fast, Visible Progress
items.description: See measurable results within the first week. No long ramp-up, no theory overload.

items.title: Live Community
items.description: Train alongside other driven professionals. Ask questions, share wins, stay accountable.

items.title: Resources Included
items.description: All templates, worksheets, and session replays included — yours to keep forever.

items.title: Expert-Led
items.description: Trained directly by practitioners who've done the work, not just taught it.

trainer.name: Your Name
trainer.title: Lead Trainer & Founder
trainer.bio: With over a decade of hands-on experience, I've helped hundreds of professionals cut through the noise and build skills that actually move the needle. This series is everything I wish I'd had when starting out — condensed, focused, and built for results.

items.title: Foundation & Mindset
items.desc: Set the stage with the core frameworks and mental models that drive everything.

items.title: Core Skills Intensive
items.desc: Deep dive into the essential skills with hands-on exercises every session.

items.title: Advanced Techniques
items.desc: Layer in advanced tactics that separate good from exceptional.

items.title: Real-World Application
items.desc: Apply everything to your own projects with live feedback and coaching.

items.title: Integration & Next Steps
items.desc: Lock in your gains, build your plan, and set up for long-term success.

items.question: Who is this training for?
items.answer: This training is designed for motivated professionals who want to accelerate their growth and see real, measurable results without wasting time on theory-heavy courses.

items.question: Is this really free?
items.answer: Yes — the training series is completely free to join. Just sign up with your name and email to reserve your spot and get all the details.

items.question: How much time do I need each week?
items.answer: Plan for 2–3 hours per week. Sessions are focused and efficient — no filler, no wasted time.

items.question: What if I miss a session?
items.answer: All sessions are recorded. Replays and resources are sent to your email within 24 hours of each session.

items.question: When does it start?
items.answer: Dates are being finalised. Sign up now and you'll be the first to know the exact schedule.

finalCta.headline: Ready to Level Up?
finalCta.subheadline: Spots are limited. Lock yours in now — it's completely free.

footer.tagline: Built for people who are serious about growth.
